     the Fermi energy is    -0.7817 ev

!    total energy              =  -14765.57392008 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19820912 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14765.37571095 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -319674.53087440 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  161293.18570302 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6092.54124964 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  149711.35389963 Ry

     total magnetization       =    92.08 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =   107.82 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  57 iterations
